title: 45mm Rotary Cutter with 5pcs Extra Blades, Ergonomic Handle Rolling Cutter with Safety Lock for Fabric, Leather, Crafting, Sewing, Quilting, Fabric Rotary Cutter Perfect for Left & Right Hand(Pink)
features: ♡ Sharp and Durable: rotary blade is made from high quality of SKS7 stainless steel with is super sharp and long-lasting,which will help to save time.Perfect for cutting multiple layers of fabric, paper, felt and vinyl,and More! effortlessly without loose edges and threads. No strings are left behind, as it cuts clean and fast.

♡ Ergonomic 45mm Rotary Cutter: Ergonomically designed handle with soft-grip for comfort on both sides. Anti-Slide & to Reduce Joint Fatigue.The blades can also be installed on both sides of the rotary cutter, perfect for both right- and left-handed users.This rotary cutter is also compatible with pink, wavy blades.

♡ Designed with Safety Button: This handy rotary cutter is designed with a safety button to lock the blade.Once the safety locking button is set, the trigger handle cannot be used.Even a kid can use it safely under the supervision of his/her parents! Blade folds away nicely and safely, when trigger handle is released.

♡ What You Get: You can get 1pcs 45mm Rotary Cutter + 1pcs rotary blade, 5pcs extra replacement rotary cutter blades stored in a case, with these blades you could use for a long time.It's easy to use and replace blades.

♡ Save Your Time: This 45mm rotary cutter is suitable for cutting all kinds of fabrics, paper, leather, scrapbooking, quilting and for all types of arts & crafts. It is more reliable and convenient than a pair of scissors while saves you so much time, the Ideal tool for Quilting, Sewing, Scrapbooking, Card Making, and other DIY Projects!
description: Product Description Multi-application This rotary cutter is a wonderful tool, makes the chore of cutting faster and more exact, 45mm rotary cutter is the most sufficient size blades for nearly all projects, Ideal for quilting, knitting, scrapbooks, sewing, fabric cutting, Seamstress, Tailors, Arts, Crafts and more. 45mm Rotary Cutter for Fabric Ergonomic handle Ergonomically designed handle with soft-grip for comfort on both sides, anti-slide & to reduce joint fatigueIt. Safety button It has a safety button that locks the handle which can prevent the knife from appearing when not in use. Perfect for both right and left-handed It is simple to use and replace blade and the blade can be installed on both sides of the rotary cutter, perfect for both right and left-handed users. Feature Ergonomic handle Safety button Anti-Slide Suitable for both right and left-handed Blades are made of SKS-7 stainless steel Perfect for Cutting Multiple Layers of Fabric Replaceable Healdey Tools rotary cutter comes with 5 extra replacement blades and stored in a plastic case. SKS-7 stainless steel Sharp and Durable The blades are made of high-quality SKS-7 steel, super Sharp and long-lasting, which can cut through to mutiple layers of fabric at once. Suitable for cutting denim, vinyl, leather, cotton, paper, and other fabrics, accurate and smoothly, effortlessly without loose edges and threads. No strings are left behind, as it cuts clean and fast. Easy to use Smooth retractable Comfort Cuts multiple materials Fabric Cutting Felt Cutting Cardboard Cutting Burlap cutting
